title: Japanese-Style Egg and Tagine Tartine
description: A Japanese-inspired dish that combines the richness of egg and tagine with the crunch of xtra peppery vegetables. Perfect for a light lunch.
instructions: Whisk the eggs and yolks together in a bowl until well combined.
Add the tagine to the eggs and mix to distribute evenly.
Season with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Transfer the egg mixture to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until set.
Meanwhile, slice the xtra, peppery, and russian ingredients thinly and set aside.
Once the eggs are set, remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Top the eggs with the sliced vegetables and serve immediately.
